name: REST API Integration Patterns
summary: How to discuss secure and maintainable API integration design in interviews.
points: Explain request flow, authentication, mapping, and validation.
Describe scheduled versus event-driven integration patterns.

name: Email and Notification Automation
summary: How saved searches, quick actions, workflows, and templates work together for communications.
points: Use quick actions or workflows for repeatable notifications.
Discuss weekly or scheduled reporting outputs.

name: Data Mapping and Transformation
summary: How records and payloads are translated between Ivanti and external systems.
points: Tie mapping to reporting accuracy and automation stability.

name: Scripted Logic Patterns
summary: When to use scripting for validation or advanced logic and how to explain it in interviews.
points: Use scripting when configuration alone is not enough.

name: Error Handling and Retry Patterns
summary: How to talk about operational resilience in automation and integration design.
points: Discuss how to avoid duplicate processing.
Mention exception visibility for support teams.

name: Automation and Orchestration Patterns
summary: How to explain chained actions, scheduling, triggered automation, and governance.
points: Discuss orchestration across modules or systems.
Explain reusable patterns and controlled execution.
